title: Fluid Interactive Cards
html_prompt: Create a single-file HTML/CSS/JS preview for an EC LAB inspiration asset: a responsive set of three fluid interactive glass cards on a soft gray ambient background. Preserve the final design structure, proportions, colors, texture, and motion: large rounded cards, animated 3D dot matrices, frosted glass lower panels, subtle grain, colored glow themes, mouse-tracked glare, lerped 3D tilt, parallax layers, and soft shadow physics. Use EC LAB / ec 的实验室 / Visual Notes / AI Workflow / Design / Prompt / Code / Inspiration / Reusable Assets / Record. Explore. Share. as the identity and content. Do not use external assets, images, CDN, frameworks, Google Fonts, or custom font files. Build everything with HTML, CSS, SVG, gradients, blur, shadows, transforms, pseudo-elements, and text. Use only the EC font sets and EC radius tokens.

css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
